message:
test(fcp-core): add attack scenario tests and golden vectors for provenance (uek4)

Add 17 new tests to validate provenance security invariants:

Attack scenario tests:
- Taint laundering without receipt rejected
- Elevation bypass without approval rejected
- Declassification leak without approval rejected
- Forged sanitizer receipt detection
- Stale and future approval token rejection
- Mixed input integrity downgrade protection
- Cross-zone without approval adds taint

Golden vector tests:
- Merge two records deterministic output
- Merge with taint propagation
- Elevation and declassification sequences
- Taint reduction lifecycle
- Flow check matrix validation
- Safety tier enforcement
- Approval token lifecycle

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
